creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wen
Date: Tue Sep 18 07:21:25 2012
New Revision: 304431
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304431

Log:
  This port adds the Sale Price List Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
  
  WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
  
  PR:		171466
  Submitted by:	Matthias Petermann <matthias@d2ux.net>

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_sale_price_list/
  head/finance/trytond_sale_price_list/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_sale_price_list/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_sale_price_list/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_sale_price_list/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Tue Sep 18 07:18:15 2012	(r304430)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Tue Sep 18 07:21:25 2012	(r304431)
@@ -122,6 +122,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_purchase
     SUBDIR += trytond_sale
     SUBDIR += trytond_sale_opportunity
+    SUBDIR += trytond_sale_price_list
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock
     SUBDIR += trytond_timesheet
     SUBDIR += venice

Added: head/finance/trytond_sale_price_list/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_sale_price_list/Makefile	Tue Sep 18 07:21:25 2012	(r304431)
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	trytond_sale_price_list
+# Date created:		08 September, 2012
+# Whom:			Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_sale_price_list
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Sale Price List Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_party>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_party \
+		trytond_sale>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_sale \
+		trytond_product_price_list>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_product_price_list
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_sale_price_list/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_sale_price_list/distinfo	Tue Sep 18 07:21:25 2012	(r304431)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_sale_price_list-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 6ae0fc549575d24e893d45a0f8e2b490e5a0ebd32f47bda789e46fe7957b1d8c
+SIZE (trytond_sale_price_list-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 19118

Added: head/finance/trytond_sale_price_list/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_sale_price_list/pkg-descr	Tue Sep 18 07:21:25 2012	(r304431)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Sale Price List Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/
